videos.title: sessionStorage JavaScript — Complete Guide
videos.description: Kyle from Web Dev Simplified covers sessionStorage methods, tab isolation, JSON serialization, and common use cases with clear examples.

videos.title: localStorage vs sessionStorage — Key Differences
videos.description: Detailed comparison between localStorage and sessionStorage covering persistence, tab isolation, use cases, and when to use each.

videos.title: Build a Multi-Step Form with sessionStorage
videos.description: Brad Traversy builds a complete multi-step form wizard using sessionStorage to persist data between steps with validation.

videos.title: sessionStorage Tutorial — JavaScript Web Storage
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on the Web Storage API with a focus on sessionStorage, including tab isolation demos and practical examples.

videos.title: JavaScript Session Storage Explained
videos.description: Kevin explains sessionStorage concepts, when to use it vs localStorage, and demonstrates tab isolation with a live coding example.

videos.title: Shopping Cart with sessionStorage and localStorage
videos.description: Build a shopping cart that uses sessionStorage for guest carts and localStorage for persistent user data with login transfer logic.

videos.title: Web Storage API — Everything You Need to Know
videos.description: Kyle covers both localStorage and sessionStorage in depth, including the storage event, tab isolation, error handling, and best practices.

videos.title: Handling Browser Storage in Private Mode
videos.description: Security-focused tutorial covering how to detect and handle Web Storage in private/incognito mode across different browsers.
